title: UAE Charter for the Development and Use of Artificial Intelligence
title_ar: ميثاق الإمارات لتطوير واستخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي
official_title: UAE Charter for the Development and Use of Artificial Intelligence
official_title_ar: ميثاق الإمارات لتطوير واستخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي
citation: UAE Charter for the Development and Use of Artificial Intelligence, 2024
summary: A national charter of twelve principles for AI development and use in the UAE, covering human oversight, safety, algorithmic bias, privacy, transparency, and accountability. It frames the UAE's ambition to be a global AI hub while committing to responsible use.
impact_note: The charter is the clearest statement of how the UAE expects AI to be governed ahead of any binding federal AI law. Companies building or deploying AI in the UAE should align governance documentation with the twelve principles, particularly human oversight, bias mitigation, and privacy commitments that connect to the federal PDPL. Treat it as the benchmark regulators and government partners will reference in procurement and future rulemaking.
notes: Issue date approximated to July 2024 and issuing body recorded as the AI Office; confirm the exact launch date, the formal issuing authority, and a direct link to the charter text before publishing.
